projects.title: Travel Comparison Pro
projects.description: An intelligent travel assistant that compares two destinations using Google's Gemini AI. It provides insights on weather, attractions, budget, safety, transportation, cuisine, and best time to visit. Users can also view locations on an interactive map and continue previous conversations through chat history.

projects.title: Maze Runner Visualizer
projects.description: A visualization tool for understanding graph traversal and shortest path algorithms. Users can generate mazes, place walls, adjust animation speed, and compare BFS, DFS, Dijkstra, and A* in real time.

projects.title: Labour Compliance Portal
projects.description: A secure compliance management system for organizations to manage employee records, upload worker data through CSV/Excel, receive compliance notices, schedule meetings with officers, and maintain company profiles from a centralized dashboard.

projects.title: Dragonstone CMS
projects.shortDescription: A personal portfolio content management system.
projects.description: A lightweight CMS built for managing a personal portfolio. It includes project management, blog publishing, media uploads, analytics integration, and a private admin dashboard named Dragonstone, protected using Cloudflare Access for single-user authentication.

projects.title: The Log Pose
projects.description: This is a compass and helps users to navigate through my projects
